basic_details.job_title: Anna University Research personnel Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Anna University Research Personnel (Project Associate-I) Notification 2026 has been released on 20 June 2026 on the official website annauniv.edu. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Anna University Research Personnel (Project Associate-I) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Post graduate degree in basic science or professional course selected through national eligibility tests (CSIR-UGC NET, GATE, National Level examinations conducted by central government departments and institutions), Two years of research experience (Desirable)
qualification.details: Post graduate degree in basic science or professional course selected through national eligibility tests (CSIR-UGC NET, GATE, National Level examinations conducted by central government departments and institutions). Two years of research experience (Desirable).

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Anna University Research personnel (Project Associate-I) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download Anna University Research personnel (Project Associate-I) Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Anna University Research personnel (Project Associate-I) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 30th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a postgraduate degree in a basic science or professional course, selected through national eligibility tests like CSIR-UGC NET or GATE. Two years of research experience is desirable.

faq.question: Q3. How can I apply for this position?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your complete application along with all required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research personnel (Project Associate-I) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 31,000 per month, plus 24% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research personnel (Project Associate-I) position will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Research personnel (Project Associate-I) in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based position. The appointment will be on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is Anna University located?
faq.answer: Anna University is located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 600025.

faq.question: Q10. Does the notification mention any age limit relaxation?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify any age limits or age relaxation details. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for comprehensive information.
